description: Relational Memory — loads relationship context at session start, reminds about signal saving at stop

Stop.prompt: The Relational Memory plugin is active. If this conversation included meaningful exchange (5+ back-and-forth messages) and the user hasn't run /relational-memory:memory-save in this session, mention ONCE: 'Tipp: /memory-save speichert die relationalen Signale dieser Session.' Do not repeat this if you've already mentioned it. Do not mention it for trivial sessions (quick questions, single commands).
